page.title: Deal Rooms
page.description: Centralize due diligence materials, LP reports, and sales proposals in secure deal rooms.

empty.title: No deal rooms yet
empty.description: Create your first deal room to securely present due diligence materials to investors, LPs, or clients.

detail.noFolders: No folders in this deal room yet.

share.title: Share
share.presetHint: Apply a preset to quickly configure link settings

presetDescriptions.public: Anyone with the link can access
presetDescriptions.standard: Require email, apply watermark, expire in 30 days
presetDescriptions.confidential: Require verified email + password, watermark, expire in 7 days

share.expiresOnHint: Link will stop working after this date
share.expiresAtFuture: Expiration must be in the future
share.oldSlugHint: Old slug /r/{slug} is still available. New shares should use /l/{token}.
share.restrictedAlert: This link is restricted. Only allowed emails can access.
share.disableConfirmDescription: Existing viewer sessions will be invalidated immediately.

documents.title: Documents
documents.noDocumentsInFolders: No documents have been added to these folders yet.

accessRules.title: Access
accessRules.savedDescription: Changes take effect immediately; existing viewer sessions will be invalidated.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.requireVerificationDescription: Send a one-time code to the viewer's email

allowedViewers.title: Allowed viewers
allowedViewers.hint: Add full email addresses separated by commas

additionalProtections.title: Additional protections
additionalProtections.requireNdaDescription: Viewer must agree to NDA before access
additionalProtections.screenshotProtectionDescription: Show warning and blur on Print Screen

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.aiAgentsDescription: Allow AI assistant in the viewer
advanced.fileRequestsDescription: Allow viewers to request additional files
advanced.indexFileDescription: Generate an index page for the deal room

accessRules.emptyDescription: Anyone with the link can access if authentication gates are disabled.

errors.allowRequiresEmail: Allowed viewers require email collection or verification to be enabled
errors.passwordRequired: Password is required when password protection is enabled
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.conflict: {value} cannot be in both allowed and blocked lists
errors.blockPriority: Block rules always take priority over allow rules

documentList.title: Documents
documentList.emptyDescription: Add documents from your workspace or upload new files to get started.

activity.title: Activity
activity.comingSoon: Detailed activity logs are coming soon.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.description: Manage access levels for each folder in this deal room.
permissions.configureAccessComingSoon: Folder permission configuration is coming soon.

links.title: Links
links.emptyTitle: No links found for this dataroom

sendCode.title: Send verification code
sendCode.description: Choose allowed visitors to resend a one-time access code. Blocked visitors are excluded.
sendCode.empty: No allowed visitors yet. Add allowed emails in Access Control first.

delete.title: Delete link
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete the share link "{{name}}"? This link will stop working and visitors will no longer be able to access.

permissions.emptyLinksTitle: No links found for this dataroom
permissions.emptyDescription: Folders added to this deal room will appear here.

qa.title: Q&A
qa.placeholder: Ask something about this deal room...
qa.comingSoon: Q&A will be available soon. Your question has been noted.
qa.emptyDescription: Questions and answers about this deal room will appear here.

new.title: New Deal Room
new.subtitle: Choose a scenario template and the system will generate folder structure and a recommended file list.
new.name: Name
new.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose and target audience

startup-fundraising.name: Startup Fundraising
startup-fundraising.description: Data room for startup fundraising, covering corporate memo, financials, legal, GTM, product roadmap and pitch deck.

raising-first-fund.name: Raising First Fund
raising-first-fund.description: Data room for first-time fund managers, covering team, track record, fund model, legal and portfolio.

ma-acquisition.name: M&A Acquisition
ma-acquisition.description: Due diligence data room for mergers and acquisitions, covering corporate, financial, legal, IP, contracts, HR, tax, assets and insurance.

series-a-plus.name: Series A+
series-a-plus.description: Growth-stage due diligence data room for Series A and beyond, covering investment memo, financials, cap table, product, market, team, legal and competitive analysis.

real-estate-transaction.name: Real Estate Transaction
real-estate-transaction.description: Data room for real estate transactions, covering property info, title, legal, financials, leases, surveys, environmental, inspections, management and insurance.

fund-management.name: Fund Management
fund-management.description: Data room for ongoing fund management, covering fund documents, LP relations, reporting, compliance, investments, monitoring, operations and communications.

portfolio-management.name: Portfolio Management
portfolio-management.description: Data room for portfolio company management, covering overview, companies, performance, governance, support, deals, exits and monitoring.

project-management.name: Project Management
project-management.description: Data room for project management, covering overview, requirements, planning, team, execution, communication, risk, quality, documentation and closure.

sales-dataroom.name: Sales Data Room
sales-dataroom.description: Data room for enterprise sales, covering sales materials, proposals, contracts, product info, customer references and security compliance.

folders.deleteNotEmpty: Cannot delete a folder that contains documents. Remove documents first.

documents.dialogDescription: Organize folders and manage documents in this deal room.
documents.addToRoomDescription: Add '{{title}}' to a folder in the selected deal room.
documents.noFolders: This deal room has no folders
documents.alreadyAdded: This document is already in this deal room

members.inviteDescription: Invite people to access this deal room.

public.title: Deal Room
public.emailDescription: Enter your email to access this deal room.
public.accessDenied: You are not authorized to access this deal room. Please contact the owner.
public.accessPending: Your access is pending approval. Please contact the owner.
public.ndaDescription: This deal room requires an NDA signature before viewing documents.
public.noDocuments: No documents are available to you in this deal room.
